PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Islam\\Desktop\\mlsite"; $env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE="config.settings.local"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "manage.py runserver" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/meta/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "tier-S"\) { "tier-S found" } else { "tier-S NOT found" }; if \($r.Content -match "Линг|Кагура"\) { "Hero names found" } else { "Hero names NOT found" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/guide/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "guide/: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "guide/ Error: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/login/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "login: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "login Error: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "S-тир прямо сейчас"\) { "S-tier section: YES" } else { "S-tier section: NOT FOUND" }; if \($r.Content -match "Линг|Кагура|Лансело"\) { "Hero names: YES" } else { "Hero names: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/guide/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "Основы Mobile Legends|osnovy"\) { "Guide index: OK" } else { "Guide index: 200 but no content" } } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/guide/interfeys-i-upravlenie/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "Интерфейс|Мини-карта"\) { "Guide detail: OK" } else { "Guide detail: 200 but no content" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match '/static/admin/'\) { "Admin static refs found" } else { "NO admin static refs" }; $r.Content | Select-String "admin/css|admin/js" | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/static/admin/js/nav_sidebar.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "JS status: $\($r.StatusCode\), size: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "JS load error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(python -c "import django; django.setup\(\); from django.conf import settings; print\('\\n'.join\(settings.INSTALLED_APPS\)\)")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from django.conf import settings; print\('\\n'.join\(settings.INSTALLED_APPS\)\)")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from django.urls import get_resolver; [print\(p\) for p in get_resolver\(\).url_patterns]")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from django.conf import settings; print\(settings.ROOT_URLCONF\)")
